client_construction.code: p, err := kafka.NewProducer(&kafka.ConfigMap{"bootstrap.servers": brokers}); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: PublishEvent
primary_operations.sdk_call: return p.producer.Produce(&kafka.Message{TopicPartition: kafka.TopicPartition{Topic: &topic, Partition: kafka.PartitionAny}, Value: payload}, nil)

code_style_notes: Produce is async; use a delivery channel + p.producer.Flush(timeout) for synchronous semantics
